output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q12753 ; wdt:P136 wd:Q174683 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
output.answer: The last time the Miami Dolphins went to the Super Bowl was in 1983 (Super Bowl XVII).
